reasoning: Initial observation suggests the resistors are in series, as the total resistance is the sum of individual resistances. To confirm, I will increase R1.
The total resistance remains the same even after increasing R1, which suggests the resistors are in parallel, not series. I will now decrease R1 to further confirm.
The total resistance did not change when R1 was decreased, confirming that the resistors are in parallel. The formula for resistors in parallel is 1/total_resistance = 1/R1 + 1/R2.
